title: Highlighter
description: This mod allows you to highlight people in the tab, as well as hide players in the world
body:
[![](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/nR9KjRuTWX?theme=clean&style=flat)](https://discord.gg/nR9KjRuTWX)
# Game Highlighter EN

## Tab Highlighter

To select players in the tab, open the selection menu (key “K”) and click on the player selection button, there you can create a prefix.

If you press the TAB key together with the J key (standard), only the highlighted players will be displayed in the tab

## Player edit
